hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' | { read -r f; case "$(basename "$f")" in .env|.env.*|*.env) printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Editing .env / secret files is blocked to prevent committing secrets. Use VITE_* env vars in the Cloudflare dashboard instead."}}';; esac; }
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // ""' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.js|*.jsx) [ -f "$f" ] && ./node_modules/.bin/prettier --write "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1;; esac; } || true
